docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $708.43 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS CARLA ROBERTS GLORIOUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
